title: ChargePoint Holdings (NYSE:CHPT) - Stock Analysis on Europe Expansion
text: Europe accounted for 23% of ChargePoint's revenue in Q4 2026, its highest share since the company's IPO. Europe emerged as a key growth engine, delivering robust double-digit gains, making it a significant contributor to the company's international expansion strategy. ChargePoint has 130,000 ports in Europe as part of its approximately 385,000 ports managed globally, including over 41,000 DC fast chargers. This substantial European footprint demonstrates the company's commitment to infrastructure development in the region. ChargePoint has established a new multi-year agreement with Rod Charging valued at $7.5 million USD and collaborative expansion with Ford Pro for UK and Germany commercial fleets. These partnerships are crucial for extending the company's market reach across European segments. International operations contributed a record revenue share, driven by robust growth and new product launches in Europe. The company is actively introducing new hardware and software solutions to support its European market penetration.
